given: Sentry global modal has a child overlay such as CompactSelect that handles Escape before the document-level modal listener

should_find.finding: handleEscapeClose ignores e.defaultPrevented, so pressing Escape inside a child overlay that already consumed the key still closes the entire modal

notes.body: Regression seed from Sentry fix 98349bd88adc847b39d2a758c89c36770ad49815. handleEscapeClose ignores e.defaultPrevented, so pressing Escape inside a child overlay that already consumed the key still closes the entire modal
